title: Why is Aadhaar not considered a date of birth proof? UIDAI explains
summary: UIDAI clarifies that Aadhaar is valid as identity proof but not as proof of date of birth. It is up to individual Aadhaar User Agencies (AUAs) and e-KYC User Agencies (KUAs) to determine their own views on the use of Aadhaar for establishing date of birth, the authority has said.
